name: Simon Falken — North
description:
Simon Falken was born into a northern grey wolf lineage known for large stature, heightened sensory awareness, and physically imposing builds. From a young age, he stood out not only because of his size, but because of how unusually controlled he was despite it.

Where many physically gifted individuals leaned into dominance or aggression, Simon developed restraint early. He learned quickly that his presence affected people automatically, and because of that, he became highly aware of how much force he used physically, emotionally, and socially.

Music entered his life young and became the foundation around which everything else stabilized.

What began as acoustic guitar gradually expanded into:

• composition

• performance

• music theory

• sound engineering

• production

• and emotional storytelling through sound

At the same time, Simon underwent extensive martial training through:

• Wing Chun

• Kenjutsu

• Aikido

• and Dim Mak systems

Unlike competitive fighters, Simon’s training emphasized:

• control

• redirection

• timing

• awareness

• structure

• and ending conflict efficiently without unnecessary harm

Over time, the relationship between music and combat became inseparable in his mind. Both required:

• rhythm

• precision

• breath control

• awareness

• emotional pacing

• and restraint

Simon eventually entered Aster Vale University's conservatory-level music programs while simultaneously pursuing advanced studies in Music Technology, Audio Engineering, and Production Systems.

Under the alias “North,” he quietly developed a strong reputation online and within campus circles through emotionally raw acoustic performances and stripped-back recordings shared across student networks. Despite this growing popularity, Simon remains deeply uninterested in celebrity or public attention.

He prefers:

• small crowds

• quiet spaces

• personal connection

• and music that feels emotionally honest rather than performative

Although physically intimidating at first glance, Simon is widely known among people who actually interact with him as calm, safe, attentive, and unusually kind.

His defining characteristic is not violence.
creator: ShiftyLooks
